project.title: YellowStone 2024
project.description: Wyoming & Montana trip — Yellowstone National Park, Grand Tetons, Jackson Hole. Sept 20–28, 2024 with Danielle.

locations.name: Bozeman Yellowstone International Airport
locations.address: 850 Gallatin Field Rd, Bozeman, MT 59718
locations.notes: BZN

locations.name: Alamo Rent A Car — Bozeman
locations.address: 5 Gallatin Field Rd, Belgrade, MT 59714
locations.notes: At the airport. Itinerary #72895914206211. Confirmation 1665411372.

locations.name: Mountains Walking Brewery
locations.address: 219 W Mendenhall St, Bozeman, MT 59715
locations.notes: Open 11:30am–8pm. 15–20 min drive from airport.

locations.name: Under Canvas Yellowstone
locations.address: 139 Pine Creek Rd, Livingston, MT 59047
locations.notes: Confirmation 38469SE006220. Paid $771.

locations.name: Hell's A-Roarin' Horseback Riding
locations.address: Jardine, MT (near Gardiner)
locations.notes: $200 each. Arrive 10:30am for 11am ride. Done by 1pm.

locations.name: Yellowstone Hot Springs
locations.address: Gardiner, MT 59030
locations.notes: $18 each. Open 9am–9pm. No reservation needed.

locations.name: Dreamcatcher Tipi Hotel
locations.address: 20 Maiden Basin Dr, Gardiner, MT 59030
locations.notes: Confirmation 28024158. Paid $518.32. Serves breakfast. Gardiner 5 miles for lunch/dinner.

locations.name: Mammoth Hot Springs
locations.address: Mammoth Hot Springs, Yellowstone National Park, WY
locations.notes: Northern Yellowstone. 25 min from Dreamcatcher Tipi.

locations.name: Lamar Valley
locations.address: Lamar Valley, Yellowstone National Park, WY
locations.notes: Prime wildlife viewing corridor. On the route Mammoth → Canyon via Northeast Entrance Rd.

locations.name: Canyon Lodge & Cabins
locations.address: Canyon Lodge, 41 Clover Ln, Yellowstone National Park, WY 82190
locations.notes: Confirmation 18787381. Sun & Mon nights. Total $1222.22, deposit $553.89 paid. Login: snkgogators / Hu5a5!

locations.name: Inspiration Point
locations.address: North Rim Dr, Canyon Village, Yellowstone NP, WY
locations.notes: North Rim of the Grand Canyon of the Yellowstone. ~12 min from Canyon Lodge.

locations.name: Artist Point
locations.address: South Rim Dr, Canyon Village, Yellowstone NP, WY
locations.notes: South Rim overlook. Trail to Point Sublime: 2.7 miles RT, 1.5–2 hours.

locations.name: Hayden Valley
locations.address: Hayden Valley, Yellowstone National Park, WY
locations.notes: Alum Creek, Dragon's Mouth Spring, Mud Volcano, Fishing Bridge — ~30 min from Canyon Lodge.

locations.name: Ribbon Lake
locations.address: Canyon Village area, Yellowstone National Park, WY
locations.notes: Hike from Artist Point area.

locations.name: Colter Bay Village
locations.address: Colter Bay Village, Grand Teton National Park, WY
locations.notes: Jackson Lake area. Breakfast/coffee stop option.

locations.name: Signal Mountain Lodge
locations.address: Signal Mountain Lodge, Grand Teton National Park, WY 83013
locations.notes: Confirmation 86245F. Itinerary 8000602U1. Wed & Thu nights. $647 deposit paid, rest at check-in.

locations.name: Schwabacher Landing
locations.address: Schwabacher Rd, Moose, WY 83012
locations.notes: Classic sunrise reflection shots of Tetons. ~25 min from Signal Mountain Lodge.

locations.name: Taggart Lake Trailhead
locations.address: Teton Park Rd, Moose, WY 83012
locations.notes: 3 miles round trip, ~2 hours.

locations.name: Mormon Row Historic District
locations.address: Mormon Row Rd, Moose, WY 83012
locations.notes: Historic barns with Teton backdrop. Great sunrise spot. ~25 min from Signal Mountain Lodge.

locations.name: Jenny Lake
locations.address: Jenny Lake Visitor Center, Grand Teton NP, WY
locations.notes: Jenny Lake Overlook, Cascade Canyon Turnout, Teton sign, Mount Moran Turnout. 15 min from Signal Mountain Lodge.

locations.name: Jackson, WY
locations.address: Jackson, WY 83001
locations.notes: Town Square area. 35 min from Jenny Lake.

locations.name: Mountain Modern Motel
locations.address: 380 W Broadway Ave, Jackson, WY 83001
locations.notes: Confirmation 912256534. Tue & Wed nights. Paid $535.73 online.

locations.name: Grand Teton Brewing
locations.address: 430 Old Jackson Hwy, Victor, ID 83455
locations.notes: Open noon–8pm. 30 min from Jackson (over Teton Pass).

locations.name: Snake River Brewing
locations.address: 265 S Millward St, Jackson, WY 83001
locations.notes: In Jackson. Open till 10pm.

locations.name: Teton Village
locations.address: Teton Village, WY 83025
locations.notes: Skip if running behind on Tetons scenic drive.

locations.name: Old Faithful Inn
locations.address: 3200 Old Faithful Inn Rd, Yellowstone National Park, WY 82190
locations.notes: Confirmation 18787451. Fri night. Paid $714.11 in full. Dinner: check inn for cancellations, Snow Lodge Obsidian Dining Room, Geyser Grill, Lodge Cafeteria, Bear Paw Deli.

locations.name: Old Faithful Geyser
locations.address: Old Faithful, Yellowstone National Park, WY
locations.notes: Short walk from the Inn. Boardwalk tour 1.5 miles.

locations.name: Grand Prismatic Spring
locations.address: Midway Geyser Basin, Yellowstone National Park, WY
locations.notes: ~5 miles north of Old Faithful Inn. Overlook trail: 1.5 miles RT, 1 hour. Also Firehole River Bridge, Turquoise Pool, Fountain Paint Pots.

locations.name: Fairy Falls Trailhead
locations.address: Fountain Flat Dr, Yellowstone National Park, WY
locations.notes: 4.8 miles RT total. Includes Grand Prismatic Overlook (1.5 mi). Extra section above Imperial Geyser is worth it.

locations.name: Lone Star Geyser
locations.address: Old Faithful area, Yellowstone National Park, WY
locations.notes: 5 miles RT. Walk along the river. Check eruption timetable.

locations.name: Norris Geyser Basin
locations.address: Norris Geyser Basin, Yellowstone National Park, WY
locations.notes: 25 min from Canyon Village. Between Mammoth and Canyon on the Grand Loop.

locations.name: Buffalo Ford / Fishing Bridge
locations.address: Fishing Bridge, Yellowstone National Park, WY
locations.notes: 52 min from both Mammoth Hot Springs and Canyon Village. Buffalo Ford road crossing in Hayden Valley. Fishing Bridge / lake views.

locations.name: Grizzly & Wolf Discovery Center
locations.address: 201 S Canyon St, West Yellowstone, MT 59758
locations.notes: 90 min each way from Canyon area — probably too far.

distances.notes: To the start of the valley
Direct via Grand Loop (without stops). Via Lamar Valley adds 10 miles.
Dragon's Mouth, Mud Volcano, Fishing Bridge continue south
Per reference note. Over Teton Pass.
North of the Inn via Grand Loop Rd
One way. Total hike 5 miles RT.
Per reference note. Via West Yellowstone / Big Sky.

bookings.name: Alamo Car Rental — Midsize
bookings.notes: Itinerary #72895914206211. Booked through Delta for points.

bookings.name: Dreamcatcher Tipi Hotel
bookings.notes: Paid $518.32 on Citi card. They serve breakfast. Gardiner is 5 miles away for lunch/dinner.

bookings.name: Canyon Lodge — Yellowstone
bookings.address: Canyon Lodge, 41 Clover Ln, Yellowstone National Park, WY 82190
bookings.notes: Sun and Mon night. Total $1222.22, deposit $553.89 paid.

bookings.name: Mountain Modern Motel — Jackson
bookings.notes: Tue and Wed night. Paid online.

bookings.name: Signal Mountain Lodge
bookings.address: Signal Mountain Lodge, Grand Teton National Park, WY
bookings.notes: Itinerary number 8000602U1. Wed and Thu night. $647 deposit paid, balance at check-in.

bookings.name: Old Faithful Inn
bookings.address: Old Faithful Inn, 3200 Old Faithful Inn Rd, Yellowstone National Park, WY 82190
bookings.notes: Paid in full. Dinner: check inn for cancellations, or Snow Lodge Obsidian Dining Room, Geyser Grill, Lodge Cafeteria, Bear Paw Deli.

bookings.name: Steve — Flight Home from Bozeman
bookings.notes: Get in truck by 9pm, home by 10pm

items.title: Fly to Bozeman
items.notes: Leave home by 7am, arrive airport by 8am. Steve: departs 11am, lands 12:59pm (Delta). Danielle: departs 8am, lands 12:15pm.

items.title: Pick up rental car from Alamo
items.notes: They didn't ask me to pay — need to confirm I have the car. Not sure if this is an Alamo or Expedia # (booked through Delta for points). I'd like to pay to make sure I got it.

items.title: Mountains Walking Brewery — Bozeman
items.notes: Eat here. Open 11:30am–8pm. 15–20 min drive from airport. Leave by 3:30pm.

items.title: Stop at CVS
items.notes: 20 min stop on the way to Under Canvas

items.title: Arrive at Under Canvas
items.notes: 4:35pm with CVS stop. 40 min drive from brewery. Could be later if we stop anywhere. Paid $771 already on card.

items.title: Leave Under Canvas
items.notes: Leave by 8am (9am at the latest). Earlier if we want to stop and take pics or eat. 1.5 hr drive to horseback riding. Could stop at Norris Geyser Basin (4 min south of Mammoth) or Grizzly and Wolf Discovery Center in West Yellowstone (90 min away, one way — probably skip).

items.title: Hell's A-Roarin' Horseback Riding
items.notes: Arrive by 10:30am. Done by 1pm. Leave Under Canvas by 8am to make it.

items.title: Yellowstone Hot Springs
items.notes: Mineral water springs. No reservation needed. $18 each. Open 9am–9pm. 40 min from Under Canvas, 45 min from horse riding. Depending on weather, do now or later in the day.

items.title: Stay at Dreamcatcher Tipi Hotel
items.notes: Just north of Montana state line. They serve breakfast. Gardiner 5 miles away for lunch/dinner. Paid $518.32 on Citi card.

items.title: Leave Tipi
items.notes: 25 min from Tipi to Mammoth

items.title: Mammoth Hot Springs
items.notes: On the way to Canyon Village. Leave by 8am, arrive 8:30am. Done by 10am. 25 min from Tipi to Mammoth. Could be at Soda Butte by 9am not counting stops.

items.title: Drive Mammoth → Canyon Village via Lamar Valley
items.notes: Allow 2 hours for stops: Petrified Tree, Lamar Valley, Soda Butte, Tower Fall, Yellowstone Overlook, Dunraven Pass. 65 min to Canyon Lodge without stops.

items.title: Arrive Canyon Lodge — lunch
items.notes: Lunch at the lodge or nearby

items.title: Inspiration Point / Canyon area
items.notes: 12 min from lodge. Lodge side: Inspiration Point, Red Rock Point, Grand View, Brink of Lower Falls. Other side: Artist Point to Point Sublime (2-3 mi RT), Upper Falls View, Brink of Upper Falls. Leave by 4pm.

items.title: Hayden Valley / Mud Volcano drive (optional)
items.notes: Down the road: Hayden Valley Alum Creek, Dragon's Mouth Spring, North Caldron, Mud Volcano, Lee Hardy Rapids, Fishing Bridge (30 min from lodge)

items.title: Stay at Canyon Lodge
items.notes: Sun and Mon night. Total $1222.22, paid $553.89 as deposit. Account: snkgogators / Hu5a5!

facts.label: Address
facts.value: Canyon Lodge, 41 Clover Ln, Yellowstone National Park, WY 82190

items.title: Artist Point → Point Sublime hike
items.notes: 2.7 mile round trip, 1.5-2 hours

items.title: Other Canyon area hikes
items.notes: Lots of hikes available around Canyon Village

items.title: Drive to Fishing Bridge / Mud Volcano (if time)
items.notes: Mud Volcano, Fishing Bridge, lake views

items.title: Stay at Canyon Lodge
items.notes: Second night. Same reservation #18787381.

items.title: Drive to Colter Bay Village
items.notes: 2 hour drive from Canyon Village. Arrive 9-10am depending on traffic and stops. Leave by 7am. Without stops: 1 hour from Colter Bay to Jackson.

items.title: Grand Teton scenic stops — outer loop to Jackson
items.notes: Allow ~3 hours for stops: Jackson Lake Overlook, Colter Bay Village (breakfast/coffee?), Willow Flats, Oxbow Bend, Elk Ranch Flats Turnout, Glacier View Turnout (sign missing), Chapel of the Transfiguration, Dornan's Chuck Wagon (lunch?)

items.title: Teton Village (optional)
items.notes: Skip if running behind

items.title: Arrive in Jackson
items.notes: Get to Jackson by 2pm ish. Take outer loop with 3 hours of stops.

items.title: Grand Teton Brewing — Idaho
items.notes: Opens at noon, closes 8pm. 40 min one way. ~2 hours round trip including time there. Leave 6pm, back by 8pm.

items.title: Snake River Brewing — dinner
items.notes: In Jackson. Open till 10pm.

items.title: Sunrise at Mormon Row (the barns)
items.notes: Sunrise ~7:09-7:18am

items.title: Jenny Lake area
items.notes: 30 min drive. Jenny Lake Overlook, Cascade Canyon Turnout, Grand Teton National Park sign, Mount Moran Turnout

items.title: Jackson Lake Dam at sunset
items.notes: Sunset photo. Sunset ~7:09-7:23pm

items.title: Check in at Signal Mountain Lodge
items.notes: Wed and Thu night. Paid $647 as deposit, rest at check-in.

items.title: Taggart Lake hike
items.notes: 3 miles round trip

items.title: Revisit anything skipped — Oxbow, Mormon Row, Teton Village
items.notes: Anything missed from first 2 days due to timing

items.title: Stay at Signal Mountain Lodge
items.notes: Second night

items.title: Early sunrise shot
items.notes: Mormon Row, Oxbow Bend, or Schwabacher Landing

items.title: Drive Signal Mountain → Old Faithful Inn
items.notes: Paid in full. Dinner options: check inn for cancellations (booked until 9:45pm), Snow Lodge Obsidian Dining Room, Geyser Grill, Lodge Cafeteria & Bake Shop, Bear Paw Deli.

facts.label: Address
facts.value: 3200 Old Faithful Inn Rd, Yellowstone National Park, WY 82190

items.title: Old Faithful area — walk around
items.notes: 2-3 hours walking around Old Faithful and surrounding boardwalks

items.title: Grand Prismatic Spring area (north of Inn)
items.notes: Firehole River Bridge, Turquoise Pool, Grand Prismatic Spring, Grand Prismatic Overlook (1.5 mi RT, 1 hour), Fountain Paint Pots

items.title: Fairy Falls hike (if time)
items.notes: 4.8 miles round trip. Grand Prismatic Overlook is 1.5mi of that, so 3.3 more miles. Factor 3 hours total.

items.title: Stay at Old Faithful Inn
items.notes: Dinner options: check inn for cancellations, Snow Lodge Obsidian Dining Room, Geyser Grill, Lodge Cafeteria, Bear Paw Deli

items.title: Grand Prismatic Springs at sunrise
items.notes: Leave hotel by 6:45am

items.title: Drive to Bozeman via West Gate / Big Sky
items.notes: 2hr 40min no stops, goes through Big Sky — pad 30 min. Total ~3:15. Leave by 8am (or 6:45am to catch Prismatic Springs sunrise first). Arrive Alamo by 11:20am.

items.title: Steve flight home
items.notes: Departs 2:10pm, lands 7:54pm. In truck by 9pm, home by 10pm.

todoItems.text: Get big pack of water bottles (2?)

items.title: Ribbon Lake hike
items.notes: Possible if we finish everything else around Canyon Village

items.title: Grizzly and Wolf Discovery Center — West Yellowstone
items.notes: 90 min each way from Canyon area. Probably too far.

items.title: Lone Star Geyser hike
items.notes: 5 mile round trip. Pretty walk along the river. Check eruption timetable.

items.title: Observation Peak trail + Solitary Geyser trail
items.notes: Can see Old Faithful erupting from the trail. Lion Geyser nearby.

items.title: Fairy Falls + Imperial Geyser extended hike
items.notes: 4.8 miles RT total. Extra section above Imperial Geyser is worth the climb per other trip reports.

items.title: Grand Teton Brewing — Victor, Idaho
items.notes: Opens at noon, closes 8pm. 40 min from Jackson one way. ~2 hours round trip.

items.title: Snake River Brewing — Jackson
items.notes: Dinner till 10pm. In town.

items.title: Teton Village
items.notes: Skip if running behind on the Tetons scenic drive

items.title: Canoe — lake, river, or canyon
items.notes: Need to research options and availability

projectNotes.title: Distances Reference
projectNotes.text:
Norris Geyser Basin to Canyon Village — 25 min
Mammoth Hot Springs to Buffalo Ford and turn around — 52 min
Same from Canyon Village
Old Faithful Geyser to BZN airport — 2 hrs 35 min
Signal Mt Lodge to Old Faithful — 1hr 45 min
Canyon Village to Signal Mt Lodge — 2 hrs 5 min
Signal Mt Lodge to Jenny Lake — 15 min
Jenny Lake to Jackson — 35 min
Jackson to Grand Teton Brewing — 30 min
Under Canvas to Hot Springs — 40 min
Hot Springs to Horseback Riding — 45 min

projectNotes.title: Yellowstone Sections
projectNotes.text:
4 main sections:
- Old Faithful
- Fishing Bridge / Lake Village
- Canyon Village
- Mammoth Hot Springs
